page_content:
ENMA643 Advanced Photonic Materials (3 Credits) The understanding of the basic optical processes in photonic devices and systems compsed of waveguides, light emitting diodes and lasers, as well as modulators is developed. Lectures on basic degradation mechanisms of such systems will be presented. The area of organic based LED reliability will be covered from the point of view of the stability of the organic-inorganic interface. Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Materials Science & Engineering department. Credit Only Granted for: ENMA698Z, ENRE648Z, or ENMA643. Formerly: ENMA698Z.

ENMA645 Advanced Liquid Crystals and Other Monomeric Soft Matter Materials (3 Credits) Elective course on the properties and behavior of liquid crystal and related soft materials, and their relationship to biomaterials and applications. Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Materials Science & Engineering department.
